title: An Immovable Object Meets an Irresistible Force: Dry Bulk Edition
section_path: An Immovable Object Meets an Irresistible Force: Dry Bulk Edition
section_path_text: An Immovable Object Meets an Irresistible Force: Dry Bulk Edition
summary:
Main
Image reference: RGB_COLOR_BRS_SHIPBROKERS_MONOGRAM_LOGO.png | assets/2025-04-22_an-immovable-object-meets-an-irresistible-force-dry-bulk-edition_img_rgb-color-brs-shipbrokers-monogram-l_ee79606c8e74.png
The US Administration is keeping wits about market participants across all industries by slapping tariffs, raising them, and thereafter removing them. Whereas it has become difficult to keep track of markets' condition, as each day feels like another turn on Trump's tariff rollercoaster, at the time of writing, all additional tariffs have been lifted - except for those targeting China which have been further increased. Nonetheless the world still has to endure a 10% baseline universal tariffs on imports, but China is taking the biggest hit after being hammered with 145% tariffs (at least by the time of writing) on all goods bound for the US.
